{
  "cells": [
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "metadata": {
        "id": "view-in-github",
        "colab_type": "text"
      },
      "source": [
        "<a href=\"https://colab.research.google.com/github/kurshid1991/Multibiomics/blob/main/1_Biology_and_Data_Foundation%20/Expression_matrix_dataset_R.rmd\" target=\"_parent\"><img src=\"https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg\" alt=\"Open In Colab\"/></a>"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "# Dataset Generation:\n",
        "\n",
        "We simulate RNA-seq counts using negative binomial distribution with biological signal\n",
        "\n",
        "This dataset mimics real RNA-seq challenges:\n",
        "\n",
        "- noise\n",
        "- batch effect\n",
        "- sparsity\n",
        "- high dimensionality”\n",
        "\n",
        "That single framing changes how seriously students take it."
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "cR70UP9qajsg"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "# Whith this dataset\n",
        "\n",
        "**Learn what is Expression Matrix**\n",
        "\n",
        "    - Show structure + sparsity\n",
        "\n",
        "**Preprocess the matrix**\n",
        "\n",
        "    - Normalize + log transform\n",
        "\n",
        "**Visualization**\n",
        "\n",
        "    - PCA separation\n",
        "    - Heatmaps\n",
        "\n",
        "**ML Module**\n",
        "    - Train classifier\n",
        "    - Show overfitting\n",
        "**Capstone**\n",
        "    - Full tumor classification pipeline"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "L4b8RIZgap82"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "set.seed(42)\n",
        "\n",
        "# =========================\n",
        "# PARAMETERS\n",
        "# =========================\n",
        "n_genes <- 12000\n",
        "n_samples <- 100\n",
        "n_de_genes <- 1000\n",
        "\n",
        "conditions <- c(rep(\"Tumor\", 50), rep(\"Normal\", 50))\n",
        "batches <- c(rep(\"Batch1\", 50), rep(\"Batch2\", 50))\n",
        "\n",
        "# =========================\n",
        "# BASE EXPRESSION\n",
        "# =========================\n",
        "base_means <- rgamma(n_genes, shape=2, scale=100)\n",
        "dispersion <- 0.4\n",
        "\n",
        "generate_nb <- function(mean, size) {\n",
        "  rnbinom(length(mean), mu=mean, size=size)\n",
        "}\n",
        "\n",
        "# =========================\n",
        "# MATRIX GENERATION\n",
        "# =========================\n",
        "counts <- matrix(0, nrow=n_genes, ncol=n_samples)\n",
        "for (i in 1:n_samples) {\n",
        "  counts[, i] <- generate_nb(base_means, dispersion)\n",
        "}\n",
        "\n",
        "# =========================\n",
        "# DIFFERENTIAL EXPRESSION\n",
        "# =========================\n",
        "de_indices <- sample(1:n_genes, n_de_genes)\n",
        "\n",
        "upregulated <- de_indices[1:(n_de_genes/2)]\n",
        "downregulated <- de_indices[(n_de_genes/2 + 1):n_de_genes]\n",
        "\n",
        "counts[upregulated, 1:50] <- counts[upregulated, 1:50] * runif(length(upregulated), 2, 6)\n",
        "counts[downregulated, 1:50] <- counts[downregulated, 1:50] * runif(length(downregulated), 0.2, 0.5)\n",
        "\n",
        "# =========================\n",
        "# LIBRARY SIZE EFFECT\n",
        "# =========================\n",
        "lib_sizes <- runif(n_samples, 0.7, 1.5)\n",
        "counts <- sweep(counts, 2, lib_sizes, \"*\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# =========================\n",
        "# BATCH EFFECT\n",
        "# =========================\n",
        "batch_genes <- sample(1:n_genes, 800)\n",
        "counts[batch_genes, 51:100] <- counts[batch_genes, 51:100] * 1.3\n",
        "\n",
        "# =========================\n",
        "# DROPOUT\n",
        "# =========================\n",
        "dropout_mask <- matrix(runif(n_genes*n_samples), nrow=n_genes) < 0.15\n",
        "counts[dropout_mask] <- 0\n",
        "\n",
        "# =========================\n",
        "# FINAL FORMATTING\n",
        "# =========================\n",
        "counts <- round(counts)\n",
        "counts[counts < 0] <- 0\n",
        "\n",
        "gene_ids <- paste0(\"Gene_\", 1:n_genes)\n",
        "sample_ids <- paste0(\"Sample_\", 1:n_samples)\n",
        "\n",
        "rownames(counts) <- gene_ids\n",
        "colnames(counts) <- sample_ids\n",
        "\n",
        "df <- as.data.frame(counts)\n",
        "\n",
        "meta <- data.frame(\n",
        "  sample_id = sample_ids,\n",
        "  condition = conditions,\n",
        "  batch = batches\n",
        ")\n",
        "\n",
        "gene_info <- data.frame(\n",
        "  gene_id = gene_ids,\n",
        "  type = ifelse(1:n_genes %in% de_indices, \"DE\", \"Non-DE\"),\n",
        "  regulation = ifelse(1:n_genes %in% upregulated, \"Up\",\n",
        "                ifelse(1:n_genes %in% downregulated, \"Down\", \"None\"))\n",
        ")\n",
        "\n",
        "write.csv(df, \"gene_expression_raw_counts.csv\")\n",
        "write.csv(meta, \"sample_metadata.csv\", row.names = FALSE)\n",
        "write.csv(gene_info, \"gene_info.csv\", row.names = FALSE)\n",
        "\n",
        "cat(\"✅ R dataset generated successfully!\\n\")"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "XSan8znlaroX",
        "outputId": "7aceec3c-4a2b-4099-fe1b-e2a71a57628a",
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        }
      },
      "execution_count": 1,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "✅ R dataset generated successfully!\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "metadata": {
    "colab": {
      "name": "Welcome To Colab",
      "provenance": [],
      "include_colab_link": true
    },
    "kernelspec": {
      "display_name": "R",
      "name": "ir"
    },
    "language_info": {
      "name": "R"
    }
  },
  "nbformat": 4,
  "nbformat_minor": 0
}
